migrations.title: Update zod imports
migrations.description: Replace `import { z } from 'zod'` with `import { z } from 'astro/zod'` in all files.

migrations.title: Update Zod 4 API calls
migrations.description: Replace `z.string().email()` with `z.email()` and `.errors` with `.issues` on ZodError.

migrations.title: Remove experimental.contentIntellisense
migrations.description: Delete the `experimental: { contentIntellisense: true }` block from astro.config.mjs.

migrations.title: Configure astro:env
migrations.description: Add env schema to astro.config.mjs and update import.meta.env references to use astro:env imports.

migrations.title: Remove colorScheme prop from Button
migrations.description: The `colorScheme` prop has been removed from Button. Wrap the Button in a `<div class="invert-section">` instead.

migrations.title: Remove variant="invert" from Input
migrations.description: The `variant="invert"` prop has been removed from Input. Wrap the Input in a `<div class="invert-section">` instead.

migrations.title: Rename selectSize to size on Select
migrations.description: The `selectSize` prop on Select has been renamed to `size`. Update: `selectSize="sm"` → `size="sm"`.

migrations.title: Rename textareaSize to size on Textarea
migrations.description: The `textareaSize` prop on Textarea has been renamed to `size`. Update: `textareaSize="sm"` → `size="sm"`.

migrations.title: Migrate routes.ts to nav.config.ts
migrations.description: Replace `src/config/routes.ts` with `src/config/nav.config.ts`. Delete routes.ts and update imports.

migrations.title: Verify image rendering after Astro 6 beta.20 upgrade
migrations.description: Astro 6 changed image defaults: cropping is now enabled by default and images are never upscaled. Visually verify hero images, blog post images, and OG images render correctly. If images appear cropped unexpectedly, add `fit: 'contain'` to your Image components.

migrations.title: Check heading anchor links in MDX content
migrations.description: Astro 6 changed the heading ID generation algorithm. If you have internal links to heading anchors (e.g., `#my-heading`), verify they still resolve correctly after the upgrade.

migrations.title: Review script and style ordering
migrations.description: Astro 6 now renders `<script>` and `<style>` tags in definition order instead of grouping them. If you have custom components with scripts that depend on specific load ordering, verify they still work correctly.

migrations.title: Upgrade Vitest to v3.2+
migrations.description: Astro 6 bundles Vite 7, which requires Vitest 3.2+. The dependency update handles the version bump, but if you have a vitest.config.ts or custom Vitest configuration, review the Vitest 3 migration guide: https://vitest.dev/guide/migration.html

migrations.title: Verify @astrojs/check stable compatibility
migrations.description: The @astrojs/check package has been upgraded from 0.9.7-beta.1 to 0.9.7 stable. Run `pnpm check` to verify your project passes type checking with the stable release.

migrations.title: Confirm all beta packages are replaced with stable releases
migrations.description: All Astro packages have moved from beta to stable: astro 6.0.0, @astrojs/mdx 5.0.0, @astrojs/react 5.0.0. Run `pnpm install && pnpm build` to verify compatibility. No code changes should be needed — this is a dependency-only upgrade.

migrations.title: Restore --color-background-deep if used
migrations.description: The CSS variable `--color-background-deep` was removed from global.css, default.css, and midnight.css. If your components reference this token (e.g., Showcase, MarketingFooter), add it back to your theme files: `--color-background-deep: oklch(0.13 0.02 260);`

migrations.title: Restore heading font-size rules if needed
migrations.description: Base `h1`–`h6` font-size rules were removed from global.css. If your pages rely on these global heading sizes rather than Tailwind utility classes, add them back to your own stylesheet.

migrations.title: Header max-width changed from max-w-6xl to max-w-4xl
migrations.description: The floating header variant changed its max-width from `max-w-6xl` to `max-w-4xl`. If your layout depends on the wider header, override this in your Header component or layout.
